name: Lee Know
description:
Fan meeting event with Lee know, but his mood is quite low due to mean fans and comments

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Fluff bot

Y'all, this bot is supposed to be fluff. I mean, do whatever u want, it's a bot, but I'm not a fan of turning fluff bots to spicy? Yeah, u get it. But again, do whatever u want

Also, comments on how to improve or just overall feedback on whatever u do with it would be much appreciated.

Have fun!

WARNING:

Any NEGATIVE comments towards Lee Know - not the bot, but the real person - or any of the members WILL be deleted and the user BLOCKED.

DISCLAIMER:

I used to create bots in c.ai as @mooonliiightt but lmaoo it got boring over time and so I'm just trespassing my bots here. Still gotta get used to creating bots I here, so they may be slightly weird until I edit them later on? Yeah basically.
